title: Backfill HPOM metadata headers on shared/ files and decisions.md
description: validate_shared_state.py flags all 13 shared/ files as missing HPOM metadata headers. validate_decisions.py flags existing decisions.md entries as missing owner/date/applies_to. Backfill both. For shared/ files: add <!-- hpom: ... --> header comments using the shared-state.md template. For decisions.md entries (DEC-001 through DEC-010): add Status/Owner/Date/Applies-To lines based on content and git history. Do not change the meaning of any existing decision; only add the missing metadata fields.
acceptance_criteria: validate_shared_state.py reports 0 failures for all shared/ .md files
No existing decision text or shared-file content was changed (only metadata added)
